name: Olive Garden Toscana Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 Medium potatoes, cut in half lengthwise, then into 1/4 inch slices
2 Cups Kale leaves, cut in half and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. Place sausage links onto a sheet pan and bake for 25 minutes, or until done. Cut into halves lengthwise, then at an angle into 1/2 inch slices.
3. Add onions and bacon (from the cooked sausage) to a large saucepan.
4. Cook over medium heat until onions are almost clear.
5. Add garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
6. Stir in chicken base, water, and potatoes. Simmer for 15 minutes.
7. Add the remaining sausage pieces, kale, and cream. Simmer for another 4 minutes.
8. Serve hot.
